err.generic: ❌ Something went wrong. Please try again.
start.body: 👛 BotPay Hi %s! 👋 💎 TON balance: %.4f 🎁 Credit: %.4f 📊 Total: %.4f TON Use the buttons below to manage your wallet 👇
wallet.body: 💳 Your wallet 💎 TON balance: %.4f 🎁 Internal credit: %.4f 📊 Total usable: %.4f TON%s 📥 Deposit address (shared by everyone): %s 💬 Your personal comment (always usable): %s ⚠️ Always put one of the comments (your personal comment or a deposit code) in the comment field when paying.
deposit.body: 📥 Deposit TON Steps: 1️⃣ Tap “Open TON Wallet” 2️⃣ Enter any amount 3️⃣ Put the code below in the Comment field 4️⃣ Confirm the transaction 🔑 Deposit code: %s ⚠️ Without this code your deposit cannot be matched. ⏰ Code valid for: 30 minutes
withdraw.insufficient: ❌ Insufficient balance. Minimum withdrawal: %.1f TON Network fee: %.2f TON
withdraw.ask_addr: 📤 Withdraw TON Balance: %.4f TON Network fee: %.2f TON Enter the destination TON address:
withdraw.bad_addr: ❌ Invalid TON address. It must start with UQ or EQ and be 48 characters long.
withdraw.ask_amount: 📍 Address: %s...%s Max withdrawable: %.4f TON (a %.2f TON fee is deducted) Enter the withdrawal amount:
withdraw.submitted: ✅ Withdrawal request submitted 💰 Amount: %.4f TON 🔧 Fee: %.2f TON 📥 Address: %s 🆔 ID: %s An admin will process it shortly.
history.title: 📋 Last 15 transactions
help.body: ❓ BotPay help 💎 TON balance Funded via the blockchain. There is one shared address for all users, and every deposit must carry its own comment. 🎁 Internal credit Added by an admin; payments draw from credit first. 📥 Deposit “Deposit” button → get a code → send TON to the address with that comment. 📤 Withdraw “Withdraw” button → address → amount → admin approval (network fee 0.01 TON). 🔄 Transfer Send balance to another user by their Telegram ID. Support: @support
transfer.insufficient: ❌ Your balance is not enough for a transfer.
transfer.ask_id: 🔄 Internal transfer Enter the recipient's Telegram ID: (e.g. 123456789)
transfer.bad_id: ❌ Invalid ID, or you can't transfer to yourself.
transfer.no_recipient: ❌ The recipient is not registered in the system.
transfer.ask_amount: 👤 Recipient: %d Your balance: %.4f TON Enter the transfer amount:
check.pending:
⏳ Not received yet.

This usually takes 1–5 minutes.
check.unconfirmed:
⏳ Not confirmed yet.

Please check again in a few minutes.
check.confirmed: ✅ Deposit confirmed! 💰 Amount: %.4f TON 💳 New balance: %.4f TON
deposit.confirmed: ✅ Deposit confirmed! 💰 Received: %.4f TON 💳 New balance: %.4f TON
admin.panel: 🔧 BotPay admin panel 👥 Total wallets: %d 📥 Total deposits: %.4f TON 💸 Total payments: %.4f TON ⏳ Pending withdrawals: %d Commands: /withdraws — list pending withdrawals /approve <id> <txhash> — approve withdrawal /reject <id> <reason> — reject withdrawal /addcredit <telegram_id> <amount> — add credit
admin.no_withdraws: There are no pending withdrawal requests.
admin.menu: 🛠 BotPay admin panel Pick a section from the buttons below 👇
admin.stats: 📊 Overview 👥 Wallets: %d 📥 Total deposits: %.4f TON 💸 Total payments: %.4f TON ⏳ Pending withdrawals: %d
admin.ask_txhash: 🔑 Send the transaction hash (txhash) to approve withdrawal %s:
admin.ask_reason: ✍️ Write the reason for rejecting withdrawal %s:
admin.ask_credit_amount: 💰 Enter the credit amount (TON) for user %d:
admin.req_not_found: ❌ Withdrawal request not found or already processed.
